title: neubeckia reticulata
intro: Neubeckia reticulata, also known as the New Zealand Astelia or Renga Renga, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neubeckia reticulata include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Neubeckia reticulata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to support overall well-being.
